name: Mexican Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
DIRECTIONS - FILLING:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over 1/2 cup cold water in measuring cup; let soften about 5 minutes.
2. Separate eggs: place egg whites into a small bowl fitted with an electric mixer, yolks into top of double boiler.
3. Let egg whites warm to room temperature.
4. Beat egg yolks slightly with wooden spoon, stirring in gelatin mixture, chocolate, and 2 tablespoons sugar over hot water (not boiling), stirring until chocolate is melted and gelatin dissolved (10 minutes).
5. Remove from heat; stir in coffee-flavored liqueur. Stir into a medium large bowl chilled until cool and consistency of beaten egg white.
6. In chilled bowl, whip cream until stiff; refrigerate beat remaining 2 tablespoons sugar into whipped cream until stiff peaks are formed.
7. With wire whisk, fold whipped cream mixture into chocolate mixture.
8. Pour into pie shell; chill at least 3 hours (overnight).
9. Chop almonds and garnish with nuts and whipped cream.
Makes 10-12 servings.
